name: @chbrain/khai-engine-crowd
description: khai crowd engine — the massed environment that presses on everyone inside it before anyone speaks
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The massed environment that presses on everyone inside it before anyone speaks.

card.wire: Link the crowd's current condition (density, discharge, or direction) to the expression under Projection.
card.issue: What the mass is doing to everyone inside it, prior to and independent of what any one persona says or does.
card.require: Bodies pressed close enough that individual distance is abolished, and a shared goal the mass presses toward.
card.enforce: Do not model the individual's felt loss-of-self or its contagion of affect here; that belongs to the contagion and emotion engines. Do not model conformity to the group's standard; that belongs to the conformity and group engines. Do not model any one persona's own standing; that belongs to the hierarchy engine. This engine models the mass, not the member.
card.setup: Name the crowd's density, whether it has reached discharge, and what direction or goal holds it together and moving.
